titleStmt.title: SII 41.145: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 145. (A.R. No. 144 of 1905.) Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr, Karur Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the north wall of the central shrine in the Vikritisvara temple at Veñjamāṅgūḍalūr.

p.hi: Kongu ruler. Kōṉērinmaikoṇḍāṉ = c. 12th-13th century A.D.

summary.p: King's order communicated to the trustees of the Tiruveñjamākkūḍal-nāyaṉār temple: The ūrār of the village had been giving to the temple a sum of 120 achchu in lieu of the ūrāṇmai-kāṇi of Vikramachōḻa-chaturvēdimaṅgalam. As the temple people asked the king that some land may be assigned to the temple instead of that money, the king agreed to make some land of six kalam seed capacity in Uḻuntankuṟichchi alias Muḍikoṇḍachōḻapuram in Veṅgāla-nāḍu as tax-free dēvadāna The taxes that were exempted were iṟai, puravu, chiṟṟāyam, ēlvaai, ugavai, cheṉṉīrveṭṭi, etc. The official signatories were Ellāmvalla-chōḻa-mūvēndavēḷān, Vāṇarāyadēvan, Tiyagavinōdadēvaṉ, Chēdirāyadēvan, Kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ, Kāḍuveṭṭi, and Muṉaiyadaraiyaṉ.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiribhuvaṉaccakkaravatti koṉeriṉmaikoṇṭā
ṉ Āḷuṭaiyār tiruveñcamākkūṭal nāyaṉār koyili
l tevarkaṉmikaḷukku nammolai kuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu Innāya
ṉār śrīpaṇṭārattil Accu Iṭṭu vikkiramacoḻaccaruppetimaṅkalat
tu Ūrāṇmaikkāṇi Oṟṟi koṇṭu Avvūrāṉkaḷ Avvaccu śrīpa
ṇṭārattukku Oṭukkiṉamaiyil Ivvaccukkunilaṅ koḷḷa veṇu
(m)meṉṟu Ittirukkoyi(li)ṟ tevarkaṉmikaḷ nammai vantu Aṟivi
ttamaiyil Ipporuḷ śrīyakki paḻañcalākai Accu nūṟṟiruvatu
m nam carakkukku naṅkaṉmikaḷ kaikkoṇṭu Ivvaccukku viṭṭa ni
lamāvatu viracoḻamaṇṭalattu veṅkālanāṭṭu Umuntaṉkuṟic
ciyāṉa muṭikoṇṭacoḻapurattu namakkut tiṟappāyc cevakappaṟṟāy varukiṟa Irupattaiyveli nilat
til Āṉaikāḻippoyyiṟ kiḻ Āṉaikāḻinelvitai kāṟcey nelvitai mukkalam Immukkalattu
kku Ellaiyāvatu kiḻakkellaikuppaṟṟu Āṉaikāḻikkavaṟku meṟkuk kuṭippaṟṟi Āṉaikāḻikkutteṟku tāḻa
ñcey vārattiṟkavaṟkuk kiḻakku tāḻañcey vārattiṟkavaṟkku vaṭakku Innāṉkellaikku Uḷpaṭ
ṭa nelvitai mukkalamum Oru pūttaṟaiyil kāṭṭeḻumāvil nelvitai mukkalattukku El
laiyāvatu kuṭippaṟṟil macakkalukku meṟku kiḻakku nokkip poṉa kavaṟku vaṭakku vaṭakūṟṟil kāṭ
ṭeḻumāppoṉ kavaṟkuk kiḻakku vaṭakūṟṟil kāṭṭeḻumāvukku teṟku Innāṉ kellaikkuṭpa
ṭṭa[ vitai] Āka nīr nila nel vitai Aṟukalattukkum muṭikoṇṭa coḻapurattil vanta Iṟai puravuciṟṟā
yam Elavai Ulavai Eppēṟpaṭṭatum ceṉṉirveṭṭi ceyyārākavum muṉṉir tuṟantu Uḻuvārkaḷākavum Innel vitai
Aṟukalattukkum Aṟṟa vilaiyāl śrīyakki paḻaṅcalākai Accu nūṟṟirupatum naṅkanmikaḷukkakeṟak kaikkoṇ
ṭamaiyil Innel vitai Aṟukalamum yāṇṭupatinmuṉṟāvatu kārmutal kaṟṟup pulappokāmuṟṟūṭṭun
tevatāṉamākak kuṭuttamaiyil cantāratittavarai cempiluñ cilaiyilum veṭṭik koḷḷap peṟuvatāka na
m Olai kuṭuttom Ivai Ellāmvallacoḻa muventa veḷān Eḻuttu Ivai vāṉarāya tevaṉeḻuttu I
vai tiyākavinota tevaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai cetirāyatevan Eḻuttu Ivai kaḷappāḷarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai kāṭu veṭṭi E
ḻuttu Ivai muṉaiyataraiyaṉ Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 41.145 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
